title: Activate Integrations when creating board from template
excerpt: I’m currently using the API to create copies of my templated board, which includes a webhook integration. This works fine except that the integration on the new board is disabled and need to be re-added to the board that…

posts.author: MattB (Matt Berlin)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m currently using the API to create copies of my templated board, which includes a webhook integration. This works fine except that the integration on the new board is disabled and need to be re-added to the board that has been created. Is there a way to either keep the webhook integration on the new board activated, or at least turn it back on through the API?

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MattB

I’m afraid that it is currently not possible to carry over integrations when duplicating boards or creating them from templates. Considering you are looking to add webhooks, it might make sense to use the API to create webhooks, using the create_webhooks mutation.

You can find more info on this here:
Webhooks - API v2

Would that help at all?

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
